U=#c return s(u)end,{},function(I,r)local s=l(r)local N=function()return U(I,{},r,s)end return N end,function(I)local r,U=-127646+127647,I[-467728-(-467729)]while U do P[U],r=P[U]-(-739158+739159),(-1023266+1023267)+r if-2571+2571==P[U]then P[U],e[U]=nil,nil end U=I[r]end end return(q(10761568-933676,{}))(s(u))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[r(-223834+182136)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
